chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. Appl. No. S- 491 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.01.2016 1. For Orders on Office Objection 2. For Hearing Son of petitioner is present in person Syed Meeral Shah, D.P.G. a/w DSP Asghar SDPO Amri and SHO Muhammad Ali SHO Jhangara. In response to the notices, the alleged detainees have been produced by their husbands and respondent No.2. The alleged detainees state that they are living happily with their husbands and they are not illegally confined. It seems that there is no element of illegal confinement in the matter as alleged by the applicant. The application is therefore, dismissed. JUDGE *Karar/-
